benefits.description: CJC1295 DAC described as 'a miracle' for soft tissue back issues
GLOW blend helped with back and knee issues, described as good but not as wonderful as CJC1295 DAC
Skin health effects from GLOW blend were more noticeable than other effects

side_effects.description: Developed an allergy to CJC1295 DAC and can no longer tolerate it
Burning sensation if GLOW blend is injected incorrectly; described as off-putting for newbies

protocol_notes: Used CJC1295 DAC back when DAC was new; later switched to GLOW blend for back and knees due to supplier availability. Plans to cycle off GLOW blend and try KLOW next. Notes skepticism about stacked blends being as synergistic as marketed. Mentions modern thought may favor straight CJC1295 or an IPA blend over DAC version.
